raw_comment:
Color of Sports
I noticed that there are more players of color in contact sports. I wonder if this has to do with how people of color are raised. This impacts my community because my community has a minority of people with color so our sports teams are typically white.

My community has a minority of people with color.
Because my community has a minority of people with color, our sports teams are typically white.
